allow: Bash(git commit -m "Fix month filter dropdown showing 0 counts and volume")
Bash(git commit -m "Month filter includes overdue active loans; processor short names")
Bash(git commit -m "Use short processor names natively in filter and counts")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix SP MERGE 400: use odata=verbose Content-Type to match __metadata in body")
